# All-maker.com

Personal site of Strahinja Milošević — Senior Technical Writer. Covers technical writing craft, career, and leadership, alongside hands-on making: metalworking, leatherworking, and cooking.

## Blog

- [About this blog](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/intro): Why I made this website and what to expect.
- [Pizza](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/pizza): Technical writing as a craft, told through the metaphor of making pizza.
- [Tech bro VS caveman](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/tech-bro): Technology overload and coping mechanisms.
- [Use cheap tools until they break](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/cheap-tools): Invest in foundational skills before you get lost in the whirlpool of tooling options.
- [Arguing with a robot](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/argue-with-robot): Using AI as a conversational sparring partner.
- [Tech and art](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/tech-art): The relationship between technical work and creative expression.
- [Alien tech writer](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/alien): What it feels like to be a technical writer.
- [Redefining technical writing](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/redefining-technical-writing): Designing knowledge flows and how the product behaves is now the job.
- [Life is an MVP](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/mvp): A minimum viable product is not a dirty word—it is an instrument of evolution.
- [Tech writing career ladder](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/career): What seniority means, and how to advance on your technical writing journey.
- [Emotional durability in leadership](https://www.all-maker.com/blog/emotional-durability): Why emotional endurance matters in leadership.

## Crafting projects

- [Introduction](https://www.all-maker.com/docs/intro): Overview of what I am making.
- [Metalworking](https://www.all-maker.com/docs/metalworking/intro): Welding and blacksmithing projects.
- [Leatherworking](https://www.all-maker.com/docs/leatherworking/intro): My journey into leatherworking.
- [Cooking](https://www.all-maker.com/docs/cooking/flatbreads): Recipes I enjoy making and consuming.

## Resources

- [Get started with technical writing](https://www.all-maker.com/docs/resources/get-started-with-technical-writing): A presentation about what technical writing is and isn't, and where to start.
